case_title: JHPDE FINANCE I, LLC VS. ROJA H KAMALI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KAMALI, ROJA

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-19-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROJA KAMALI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING TO DEC-26-2018 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR APPLICANT TO FILE AN AMENDED APPLICATION NO LATER THAN NOON ON 12/21/18 WITH A COURTESY COPY DELIVERED TO DEPT. 206. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-26-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROJA KAMALI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
